message:
style: apply rustfmt across all crates

Mechanical rustfmt reformatting with no logic changes:
- Line-length compliance: break long expressions across lines
- Import reordering: alphabetical within use blocks
- Struct variant collapsing: single-field variants to one line
- Blank line removal between section comments and fields
- let-else / if-let brace placement normalization
- Method chain reformatting
- Function argument one-per-line style in tests
- Comment alignment after column changes

Affected: cli, core (8 atc_* files), db (4 files + 2 test files),
server (4 files), tools (7 files)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
